name: Boboli Topping 18
recipeIngredient: 1 8 oz Boboli Shell, warmed or two six-inch shells
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a 10-inch skillet over low heat.
2. Stir in the onion and cook until it becomes limp.
3. In a small bowl, mix together mustard, ginger, orange juice, orange peel, chili powder, brown sugar, and salt.
4. Add the sliced apple and sauce mixture to the skillet with the onion.
5. Cover and cook over low heat until the apples are soft.
6. Stir in the roast pork and cook until heated through.
7. Spoon half of the cooked mixture into each bread shell.
8. Quarter the remaining mixture for easy eating.
9. Makes 2 large individual servings (4 quarters each) or 4 snack servings (2 quarters each).
